title: Kinematics — Motion with Constant Acceleration
description: Describe motion using displacement, velocity and acceleration; read and sketch motion graphs; derive and apply the five SUVAT equations; and extend them to model projectile motion under gravity.
objectives: Distinguish displacement, velocity and acceleration, and interpret their signs
Read gradients and areas from displacement-time and velocity-time graphs
State and derive the five SUVAT equations of constant acceleration
Select and apply the correct SUVAT equation to solve motion problems
Model projectile motion by treating the horizontal and vertical components independently

lessons.title: Motion graphs: displacement, velocity and acceleration
